_comment: AI-Toolbox tool catalog — consumed by toolbox.{sh,ps1}. Each entry is an installable tool with a type that selects the install handler.

tools.name: component-audit
tools.description: Audit a codebase for component-orientation drift.

tools.name: discover
tools.description: Discover interesting recent videos across AI and dev topics.

tools.name: transcribe
tools.description: Transcribe a video or audio file — captions/Whisper, frames, diarization.

tools.name: fable-mode
tools.description: Five-phase Fable-grade reasoning protocol (Scope, Evidence, Attack, Verify, Report).

tools.name: idempotent-devops
tools.description: Scaffold, audit or verify-loop idempotent DevOps scripts.

tools.name: oracle-skill
tools.description: Set up + use an Oracle MCP server (SQLcl sql -mcp) for SQL data queries.

tools.name: cli
tools.description: The toolbox CLI itself, as a system-wide 'toolbox' command.

tools.name: aiprofil
tools.description: Unified backend-profile switcher across Claude Code (env) + Kilo (kilo.jsonc).

tools.name: cc-profil
tools.description: Switch Claude Code env-var profiles (API key / endpoint / model).

tools.name: kilo-profil
tools.description: Point the Kilo Code config (kilo.jsonc) at a backend profile.
